# Checkbox

A checkbox component with a label, animated check indicator, and configurable color palette. Wraps the Chakra UI Checkbox compound component into a single convenient API.

## Import

```jsx
import { Checkbox } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `label` | `string` | - | Label text displayed next to the checkbox |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | Alternative to `label` for custom label content |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette for the checkbox |
| `animated` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to apply hover and check animations |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the checkbox is disabled |
| `checked` | `boolean` | - | Controlled checked state |
| `defaultChecked` | `boolean` | - | Initial checked state for uncontrolled usage |
| `onCheckedChange` | `(details: { checked: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the checked state changes |
| `indeterminate` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms and conditions" />
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [checked, setChecked] = useState(false);

<Checkbox
  checked={checked}
  onCheckedChange={(e) => setChecked(e.checked)}
  label="Subscribe to newsletter"
/>
```

### With custom color

```jsx
<Checkbox colorPalette="green" label="Verified" />
```

### Disabled

```jsx
<Checkbox disabled label="Cannot change" />
```

### Indeterminate

```jsx
<Checkbox indeterminate label="Select all" />
```

### Without animation

```jsx
<Checkbox animated={false} label="No animation" />
```

## Features

- Renders a complete checkbox with hidden input, visual control, indicator, and label
- Pop animation on check for tactile feedback
- Scale-up animation on hover
- Supports indeterminate state for "select all" patterns
- Configurable color palette for themed checkboxes
- Forwards refs to the root element
